emergency_routing_rules.fallback_message: We will have someone call you back shortly

integration_constraints: Never mention ServiceTrade to callers — internal use only
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, Clara greets the caller, determines whether the call is an emergency, collects caller name, callback number, and address for emergencies, then attempts transfer to on-call. If transfer fails, informs caller of callback within the committed timeframe.
office_hours_flow_summary: During business hours, Clara greets the caller, collects name and reason for call, then transfers to the main office line.
questions_or_unknowns: Emergency on-call primary phone number not specified
Business hours main transfer number not specified
notes: Extracted via rule-based engine from transcript. Source: demo call.
